name: TTDInject Usage Detected
description: Detects the execution of `ttdinject.exe`, a component of Time Travel Debugging (TTD). While a legitimate tool, its presence and execution in non-development environments can be indicative of suspicious or malicious activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was created, which should be 'ttdinject.exe'.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute ttdinject.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
